title: Accenture India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Accenture India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Accenture India has an exciting opening for a Full Stack Developer at our Pimpri-Chinchwad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Accenture India:
Accenture India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Accenture India!
